sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 254 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.8 & 28. 2. For orders on CMA No.1522/2025. 3. For orders on CMA No.1570/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 22.01.2026 Mr. Faheem Ali Memon, advocate for the applicant. 1. Deferred. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3&4. Learned counsel states that the impugned order is that of remand, wherein the concerned officer has been directed to consider the appellants contention in the evidence to be produced and pass a speaking and judicious order after due verification and strictly in accordance with law. Learned counsel seeks it may be just and proper to dispose of this reference application with the observation that aforementioned order be complied with uninfluenced by any observation contained in the impugned order. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
